name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13409 Black Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zip coin purse features a timeless design that blends practical functionality with playful style, adding vitality to the season. The coin purse is made of monogram coated canvas and features joyful rainbow tones, paying tribute to Takashi Murakami's iconic vivid color style. The coin purse has a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
